positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene viewed through a kaleidoscope lens, depicting glowing flora and fauna in a highly decorative manner. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Main subject: diverse group of mythical woodland creatures (e.g., stylized deer, luminous foxes, iridescent hummingbirds) interacting peacefully around oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau and graphic enamel etching, using bold, clear lines and stylized natural elements. Color direction: saturated jewel tones (deep emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, accented with neon coral and gold leaf highlights). Lighting: Soft, diffused glow emanating from the subjects and plants, creating high contrast silhouettes against a slightly darker background. Composition: Perfect symmetry, designed for seamless repeat, with a clear visual hierarchy that guides the eye through the central grouping. Crisp edges, vector illustration quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, low quality, blurry, artifacts, noise, watermark, signature, text, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, muddy colors, grayscale, realistic photography, gradients
